name: Discord
tagline: Run your agent as a Discord bot — inbound DMs + @-mentions, outbound send/read/react tools.

name: Artifact (Generative UI)
tagline: Render HTML/SVG/Mermaid/React into a sandboxed iframe (show_artifact). Ships built-in with protoAgent.

name: Terminal
tagline: A full terminal (xterm.js + a real PTY over WebSocket) as a console view, themed from the design system.

name: Agent Browser
tagline: Browser automation backed by vercel-labs/agent-browser: tools + skill + workflows + a live browser panel.

name: Project Board
tagline: Board-driven coding orchestration — a beads board + ACP spawn loop + planning layer + console view.

name: Portfolio
tagline: Multi-team orchestration — one PM across many project boards over A2A (ADR 0055).

name: Product Manager
tagline: PM toolkit — 65 PM skills, a provenance-enforced PM Brain, specialist subagents, and a brain dashboard.

name: SpaceTraders
tagline: An autonomous SpaceTraders fleet commander — crew subagents, navigation/mining/trading tools, workflows, and a Fleet dashboard. The reference full-bundle plugin.

name: protoTrader Finance
tagline: Trading research as a full bundle — market data, backtesting, factor IC, a behavioral journal, a gated paper broker, the research desk, and a Quant Desk dashboard.

name: Monarch Money
tagline: Give your agent access to Monarch Money via its MCP server.

name: DOOM
tagline: But can it run DOOM? Play shareware DOOM in a console view via WebAssembly (prboom).

name: Career Coach
tagline: Your career coach & job-hunt copilot — strategy, mock interviews, honest CV feedback, and offer/negotiation coaching, plus an autonomous evaluate→tailor→apply pipeline. A full-surface plugin showcase.

name: GitHub (read/write tools)
tagline: Read AND write GitHub over the gh CLI — PRs, issues, diffs, CI, repo files; plus gated create/edit/merge/close, comments, labels (per-agent write gating). Ships a read-only Issues/PRs board, a util-bar New-issue widget, and the user-only /issue command.

name: Google Workspace
tagline: Google Workspace for your agent, built to grow — Gmail (read + draft-only, never sends, plus mailbox hygiene) and Calendar (read + free/busy + search).

name: Cowork (document skills)
tagline: Office-document skills for the Cowork archetype — Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and PDF as real files — plus schedule, memory-consolidation, and writing-voice habits (ADR 0083).

name: Claude Bridge
tagline: Explore Claude Code's on-disk state — sessions, memory, scratchpads — and translate its skills, subagents, and MCP config over to protoAgent.

name: Computer Use
tagline: Drive native GUI apps on this machine — snapshot a window's accessibility tree, then click/type/scroll by element without stealing focus. Wraps the cua-driver binary.

name: Learning Wiki
tagline: An adaptive learning wiki — an LLM-maintained, interlinked concept wiki plus a learner ledger: per-concept strength, misconceptions, and FSRS-scheduled review.

name: protoBanana (image gen)
tagline: Native image generation and editing via the protoBanana gateway — text-to-image, instruction edits, and identity-preserving edits over self-hosted ComfyUI workflows.

name: PR Reviewer (protoPatch)
tagline: The deterministic half of the PR-review QA tier — budgeted protoPatch structural reviews as a fifth review-panel member (ADR 0078).

name: Plugin Devkit
tagline: Build your own plugins — the authoring kit + reference plugin. A scaffold tool, an architect subagent, the building-plugins skill, and a console guide, in one bundle.

name: Delegate Registry
tagline: A hot-swappable registry of the agents and endpoints your agent can talk to — fleet A2A agents, OpenAI-compatible endpoints, ACP coding agents — managed from the console.

name: CLI Coding Agent (ACP)
tagline: Let the lead agent spawn a CLI coding agent — protoCLI, Claude Code, Codex, or Gemini CLI — and hand it a real coding job over the Agent Client Protocol.

name: Telegram
tagline: Run your agent as a Telegram bot — inbound DMs and groups, replies back out. A tiny reference communication plugin.

name: Hello (example)
tagline: A minimal starting point — one tool, one bundled skill, and a console view. Copy it to scaffold your own plugin by hand.
